description: Perform a monthly revenue trend analysis on the Chinook database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db, connection name 'Chinook') using SQL window functions. The analysis must include YearMonth (YYYY-MM), MonthlyRevenue, CumulativeRevenue, PrevMonthRevenue, MoMGrowthPct, MovingAvg3M, and YearRank. Round all decimal values to 2 decimal places and order results by YearMonth ascending. Export the results to /home/ga/Documents/exports/monthly_revenue_trends.csv and save the SQL query script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/monthly_revenue_analysis.sql.
